name: Split View shows desktop and mobile previews side by side
description: On the Preview tab, clicking the Columns (Split View) toggle button shows two preview iframes (Desktop + Mobile) side by side.

planSteps.description: Click the 'المعاينة' (Preview) tab in the bottom dock
Verify a preview iframe with title 'main-preview' is visible
Click the button with title 'عرض منقسم (مقارنة)' in the preview toolbar
Verify an iframe with title 'split-desktop-preview' is visible
Verify an iframe with title 'split-mobile-preview' is visible
